transcript:
CALLER: Good morning. I need to understand the reimbursement process. I paid out of pocket at another clinic and now I want to claim it. But the next time, I want cashless here.
AGENT: Good morning! I can help clarify both. For your previous out-of-pocket expenses, you'd need to submit all original bills, prescriptions and discharge summary to your TPA directly — we can't process another facility's reimbursement here.
CALLER: Understood. And for future cashless at Sunrise?
AGENT: For planned admissions here, you'll need a pre-authorisation from your insurer or TPA. You or your doctor can apply for it. Our insurance desk will also guide you through it on arrival. Which insurer are you with?
CALLER: Bajaj Allianz.
AGENT: Yes, we're on Bajaj Allianz's network. You're all set to use cashless here. Just bring your health card and a doctor's referral.
CALLER: Wonderful. Thanks for the clear explanation.
